image_5f659297edbd4e.png.note: 線段AD乘以角ADC正弦的計算式
image_5f659297edbd4e.png.raw: {"class":"formula","latex":"=\\overline{AD}\\times \\sin \\angle ADC=\\sqrt{10}\\times \\frac{3}{\\sqrt{10}}=3","note":"線段AD乘以角ADC正弦的計算式"}

image_8110c60e4c4804.png.raw: {"class":"formula","latex":"\\cos \\angle ADC=-\\cos \\angle ABC\\Rightarrow \\frac{3^2+x^2-4^2}{2\\times3\\times x}=-\\frac{3}{8}\\Rightarrow 4x^2+9x-28=0","note":"餘弦關係推導二次方程"}

image_a747ab4f7fc754.png.note: 餘弦定理公式計算過程
image_a747ab4f7fc754.png.raw: {"class":"formula","latex":"\\cos C = \\frac{4^2 + 9^2 - \\overline{BD}^2}{2 \\times 4 \\times 9} = \\frac{7^2 + 9^2 - 8^2}{2 \\times 7 \\times 9}","note":"餘弦定理公式計算過程"}
